Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.bean.hal.HalResource

Packages that use HalResource
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.bean.hal
Juneau @Marshalled types for the HAL (Hypertext Application Language) hypermedia format, also covered by draft-kelly-json-hal-08.

  • Uses of HalResource in org.apache.juneau.bean.hal

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HalResource
    HalResource.addEmbedded(String relation, HalResource value)
    Convenience method that embeds a single sub-resource under the given relation.
    HalResource
    HalResource.addEmbedded(String relation, HalResource... values)
    Convenience method that appends one or more sub-resources to a HalResourceArray stored under relation.
    HalResource
    HalResource.addLink(String relation, HalLink value)
    Convenience method that adds a single link under the given relation.
    HalResource
    HalResource.addLinks(String relation, HalLink... values)
    Convenience method that appends one or more links to a HalLinkArray stored under relation.

    Generic property setter.
